text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh noooo! I wonder where I left them...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I made a lot of flyers for today's street
performance!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You don't think someone took all of them, do
you?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No! One flyer per person! I am everyone's Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon exhausts herself running around
looking for the paper bags full of her flyers.
